inputs.prompt: Edit this scene as a SEQUENCE OF DISTINCT SHOTS with HARD CUTS between them — NOT one continuous camera move. [Image1] is an ingredient reference for the world, character, palette, and beats only; do not reproduce the storyboard grid, borders, or labels. A painterly concept-art forge: cool electric blue and violet shadow, warm gold automata, orange spark-light, volumetric haze; the seams are visible, nothing is smooth or over-rendered. Cut the following distinct camera setups in order, each held briefly then a clean hard cut to the next — same world, same bearded blond Hephaestus, same gold automata throughout. SHOT 1, wide: the long line of gold automata receding into the blue workshop. Hard cut. SHOT 2, medium: Hephaestus lifting a finished gold automaton off the line. Hard cut. SHOT 3, close-up: Hephaestus's weary face, looking off screen-right. Hard cut. SHOT 4, close-up: the automaton's serene gold face, looking screen-left, eyes meeting his. Hard cut. SHOT 5, over-the-shoulder from behind the automaton: the receding army of identical automata with tiny Hephaestus among them. Five clean cuts, distinct framings, no morphing between them.
